rationale: El Niño is the most relevant event for a Portuguese resident given Iberia's high wildfire and drought vulnerability; other headlines are distant or irrelevant.

top_events.title: El Niño under way, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Active El Niño significantly raises wildfire, drought and heatwave risk in Iberia — directly threatening Portugal's summer season, tourism and agriculture.

top_events.title: Trump administration sanctions Cuba's national oil company
top_events.summary: US tightening Cuba sanctions could marginally affect Atlantic trade flows and EU diplomatic dynamics, with minor indirect relevance to Portugal.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang
top_events.summary: Geopolitically distant from Portugal; minimal direct impact on daily life.
